files.content:
import { HbTypographyDirective } from './typography.directive';

export const HbTypographyImports = [HbTypographyDirective] as const;

demos.content:
import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component } from '@angular/core'; import { HbTypographyImports } from '@herbst/ui'; @Component({ selector: 'hb-demo-typography-modifiers', imports: [HbTypographyImports], template: `

Primary — saved

Success — uploaded

Warning — low light

Destructive — deleted

Muted — archived

Weight normal

Weight medium

Weight semibold

Weight bold

Aligned left

Aligned center

Aligned right

Justified paragraph that stretches each line to both edges so the autumn notes form a tidy rectangular block of text.

`, changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush, }) export class HbDemoTypographyModifiersComponent {}

import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component } from '@angular/core'; import { HbTypographyImports } from '@herbst/ui'; @Component({ selector: 'hb-demo-typography-variants', imports: [HbTypographyImports], template: `

Autumn in the Black Forest

The turning leaves

Colour & light

What to look for

A quiet season of mist, wind, and falling leaves.

Oaks and beeches turn amber and rust, the mornings grow cool and grey, and the forest floor fills with colour underfoot.

“Autumn is a second spring.”
  • Amber oak leaves
  • Cool, misty mornings
  • Chestnuts underfoot

The album ID is IMG·019 from Freiburg.

Large statement text

Small helper text

Muted secondary note

`, changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush, }) export class HbDemoTypographyVariantsComponent {}
